Space Adventure

Blast off on a journey through space! Explore planets, play games, and read stories along the way.

Created by SR1 STEM Learning Designer, Tzu Hsin (Kitty) Huang · 2026
Pick an adventure to begin!

Explore Planets

Tap each planet to discover fun facts about it.

How Things Move

See Earth spin and the Moon orbit around it.

Space Story

Read along with Nova on a trip past every planet.

Put in Order

Drag the planets into the right spots from the Sun.

Fun Quiz

Answer space questions and see how much you know.

Match Game

Match each planet to its special clue.

Memory Match

Flip the cards and find the matching planet pairs.

My Storybook

Read “You Already Sparkle” with pictures and audio.

👇 Tap a planet to explore it! They go in order from the Sun.
🌍 How Things Move
Watch it move — then stand up and try it with a friend!
☀️ The Sun (on the right) lights the Moon. Watch its light change as it orbits! Tap Earth or the Moon to speed up.
🔢 Put the Planets in Order
Drag each planet into the right spot — closest to the Sun goes first!
❓ Space Fun Quiz
🔗 Match the Planet
Tap a planet on the left, then tap its clue on the right!

Planets

Clues

📖 Nova's Space Story
Follow Nova the explorer on a trip past every planet. Tap Next to read along!
🧠 Planet Memory Match
Flip two cards to find matching planets. Find all the pairs!
📚 You Already Sparkle
A storybook by Kitty Huang. Tap Play to hear each page read aloud!
